title: Unconstrained Delegation TGT Capture via Rubeus monitor
description: Detects harvesting of TGTs cached on a host trusted for unconstrained delegation. Rubeus 'monitor'/'dump' continuously extracts forwarded TGTs (often paired with a coercion such as Printerbug to force a DC to authenticate). GOAD chains unconstrained delegation with the printer bug.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*monitor /interval*' or 'Command Line' like '*rubeus monitor*' or 'Command Line' like '*triage*')) or (('Command Line' like '*dump*' and 'Command Line' like '*/service:krbtgt*')))
